# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch snapshot configuration for automated backups. Configure snapshot repository to S3 or file share for the operations team. Implement snapshot creation and restoration functionality.
# Category: datastore_security

snapshot_repository:
  s3:
    method: PUT
    endpoint: /_snapshot/ops-s3-repo
    body:
      type: s3
      settings:
        bucket: elasticsearch-snapshots
        base_path: operations/prod
        region: us-east-1
        compress: true
        server_side_encryption: true
        storage_class: standard_ia
        readonly: false

  fs:
    method: PUT
    endpoint: /_snapshot/ops-fs-repo
    body:
      type: fs
      settings:
        location: /mnt/elasticsearch/snapshots
        compress: true
        readonly: false

snapshot_policy:
  method: PUT
  endpoint: /_slm/policy/ops-automated-backups
  body:
    schedule: "0 30 1 * * ?"
    name: "<ops-snapshot-{now/d}>"
    repository: ops-s3-repo
    config:
      indices:
        - "*"
      ignore_unavailable: true
      include_global_state: true
      partial: false
      metadata:
        team: operations
        purpose: automated-backup
    retention:
      expire_after: 30d
      min_count: 7
      max_count: 60

snapshot_create:
  method: PUT
  endpoint: /_snapshot/ops-s3-repo/manual-snapshot-%3C%7Bnow%2Fd%7D%3E?wait_for_completion=true
  body:
    indices:
      - "*"
    ignore_unavailable: true
    include_global_state: true
    partial: false
    metadata:
      requested_by: operations
      type: manual

snapshot_status:
  method: GET
  endpoint: /_snapshot/ops-s3-repo/_all

snapshot_restore:
  method: POST
  endpoint: /_snapshot/ops-s3-repo/manual-snapshot-%3C%7Bnow%2Fd%7D%3E/_restore?wait_for_completion=true
  body:
    indices:
      - "*"
    ignore_unavailable: true
    include_global_state: false
    partial: false
    rename_pattern: "(.+)"
    rename_replacement: "restored-$1"

snapshot_restore_specific:
  method: POST
  endpoint: /_snapshot/ops-s3-repo/ops-snapshot-2026.04.01/_restore?wait_for_completion=true
  body:
    indices:
      - logs-*
      - metrics-*
    ignore_unavailable: true
    include_global_state: false
    partial: false

snapshot_delete:
  method: DELETE
  endpoint: /_snapshot/ops-s3-repo/ops-snapshot-2026.04.01

operations_runbook:
  repository_selection:
    preferred: ops-s3-repo
    alternate: ops-fs-repo
  steps:
    - create_repository_s3
    - create_repository_fs
    - apply_slm_policy
    - verify_snapshots
    - restore_when_required
